records.m_Talk_ENG: What you wish for is Thagirion's death.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What you wish for is Thagirion's death.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What you wish for is Thagirion's death.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yet, she has at least six Golden Branches in her possession.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yet, she has at least six Golden Branches in her possession.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yet, she has at least six Golden Branches in her possession.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you are to aim for the Demon Lord's heart, you will have to strike it seven times.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you are to aim for the Demon Lord's heart, you will have to strike it seven times.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you are to aim for the Demon Lord's heart, you will have to strike it seven times.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, what you will need is... a bullet that guarantees to penetrate her heart in any condition.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, what you will need is... a bullet that guarantees to penetrate her heart in any condition.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, what you will need is... a bullet that guarantees to penetrate her heart in any condition.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I got hit... again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I got hit... again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I got hit... again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That will be the third time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That will be the third time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That will be the third time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am certain I dodged it. But why...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am certain I dodged it. But why...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am certain I dodged it. But why...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why am I not able to avoid it?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why am I not able to avoid it?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why am I not able to avoid it?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The most your soul can endure is likely six shots.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The most your soul can endure is likely six shots.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The most your soul can endure is likely six shots.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Luckily, we have already succeeded in striking her heart once.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Luckily, we have already succeeded in striking her heart once.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Luckily, we have already succeeded in striking her heart once.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you are able to shoot all six bullets directly aimed at Thagirion's heart...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you are able to shoot all six bullets directly aimed at Thagirion's heart...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you are able to shoot all six bullets directly aimed at Thagirion's heart...

records.m_Talk_ENG: then you will definitely defeat her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: then you will definitely defeat her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: then you will definitely defeat her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fourth...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fourth...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fourth...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A mere bullet... penetrated my defense?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A mere bullet... penetrated my defense?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A mere bullet... penetrated my defense?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I cannot block them...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I cannot block them...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I cannot block them...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keep in mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Keep in mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Keep in mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike the Demon Lord with her Golden Branches, you only have one life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike the Demon Lord with her Golden Branches, you only have one life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike the Demon Lord with her Golden Branches, you only have one life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Khhk...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Khhk...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Khhk...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not yet!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not yet!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not yet!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And this is...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And this is...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And this is...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The fifth round!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The fifth round!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The fifth round!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How are you still able to move...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How are you still able to move...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How are you still able to move...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Humans are easily wounded as they are made of flesh and bone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Humans are easily wounded as they are made of flesh and bone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Humans are easily wounded as they are made of flesh and bone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Digging into their flesh will plummet their morale...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Digging into their flesh will plummet their morale...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Digging into their flesh will plummet their morale...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Broken bones turn boldness into screams.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Broken bones turn boldness into screams.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Broken bones turn boldness into screams.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There has never been a human who was different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There has never been a human who was different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There has never been a human who was different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sixth...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sixth...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sixth...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That paladin is not much different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That paladin is not much different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That paladin is not much different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She is just a human.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She is just a human.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She is just a human.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have surely broken both of your legs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have surely broken both of your legs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have surely broken both of your legs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter if you are the Antagonist. Without legs, you cannot run wild.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter if you are the Antagonist. Without legs, you cannot run wild.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter if you are the Antagonist. Without legs, you cannot run wild.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: All I need... is for my finger to be able... to pull the trigger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All I need... is for my finger to be able... to pull the trigger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All I need... is for my finger to be able... to pull the trigger.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
You persistently aimed for my heart even in the moment I attacked your legs
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
You persistently aimed for my heart even in the moment I attacked your legs
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
You persistently aimed for my heart even in the moment I attacked your legs
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: It means that a single bullet cannot be wasted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It means that a single bullet cannot be wasted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It means that a single bullet cannot be wasted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Am I correct?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Am I correct?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Am I correct?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've become... talkative, Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've become... talkative, Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've become... talkative, Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only thing that we will be exchanging is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only thing that we will be exchanging is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only thing that we will be exchanging is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: this bullet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: this bullet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: this bullet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You seem unafraid of death.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You seem unafraid of death.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You seem unafraid of death.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, what about this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, what about this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, what about this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Merlin?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Merlin?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Merlin?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Apostle is... still alive?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Apostle is... still alive?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Apostle is... still alive?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That... is not alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That... is not alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That... is not alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She is a mindless puppet... threaded by Thagirion's string.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She is a mindless puppet... threaded by Thagirion's string.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She is a mindless puppet... threaded by Thagirion's string.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, <color=#ffd34c>this devil</color> is your weakness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, <color=#ffd34c>this devil</color> is your weakness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, <color=#ffd34c>this devil</color> is your weakness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are no different from other humans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are no different from other humans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are no different from other humans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you pull that trigger, that devil will be crushed by my sister's hands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you pull that trigger, that devil will be crushed by my sister's hands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you pull that trigger, that devil will be crushed by my sister's hands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if you choose to aim the barrel elsewhere... you will be able to save that devil.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if you choose to aim the barrel elsewhere... you will be able to save that devil.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if you choose to aim the barrel elsewhere... you will be able to save that devil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not fall for her meaningless tricks!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not fall for her meaningless tricks!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not fall for her meaningless tricks!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the Demon Lord lives, we will all perish! Do not mind me and aim for her heart!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the Demon Lord lives, we will all perish! Do not mind me and aim for her heart!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the Demon Lord lives, we will all perish! Do not mind me and aim for her heart!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Choose...! Antagonist!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Choose...! Antagonist!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Choose...! Antagonist!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The seventh round...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The seventh round...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The seventh round...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It is over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It is over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It is over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I still have one more in the chamber...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I still have one more in the chamber...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I still have one more in the chamber...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aagh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aagh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aagh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... Uuh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... Uuh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... Uuh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were too late.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were too late.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were too late.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The moment you pulled that trigger, you set your fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The moment you pulled that trigger, you set your fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The moment you pulled that trigger, you set your fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You missed your mark.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You missed your mark.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You missed your mark.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And it seems that you have run out of the magical bullets you got for selling your soul.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And it seems that you have run out of the magical bullets you got for selling your soul.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And it seems that you have run out of the magical bullets you got for selling your soul.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How does it feel to be hung like a slab of meat while your adversary grips your heart?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How does it feel to be hung like a slab of meat while your adversary grips your heart?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How does it feel to be hung like a slab of meat while your adversary grips your heart?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Finally...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Finally...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Finally...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm able to... stand shoulder to shoulder with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm able to... stand shoulder to shoulder with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm able to... stand shoulder to shoulder with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Compared to your large figure... you are also... just a normal girl.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Compared to your large figure... you are also... just a normal girl.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Compared to your large figure... you are also... just a normal girl.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I expected that you would glare or thrash about...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I expected that you would glare or thrash about...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I expected that you would glare or thrash about...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Instead, you try to provoke me with such crass sympathy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Instead, you try to provoke me with such crass sympathy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Instead, you try to provoke me with such crass sympathy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: must have a reason... for hating humans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: must have a reason... for hating humans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: must have a reason... for hating humans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is the meaning of this nonsense...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is the meaning of this nonsense...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is the meaning of this nonsense...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lastly...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lastly...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lastly...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You must not waste a single bullet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You must not waste a single bullet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You must not waste a single bullet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because after you fire all six bullets...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because after you fire all six bullets...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because after you fire all six bullets...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The next shot will be aimed at your heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The next shot will be aimed at your heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The next shot will be aimed at your heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But what should I do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But what should I do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But what should I do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I also have beliefs...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I also have beliefs...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I also have beliefs...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I can't compromise to keep you alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I can't compromise to keep you alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I can't compromise to keep you alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A bullet...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A bullet...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A bullet...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why...

records.m_Talk_ENG: did it... come from behind me...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: did it... come from behind me...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: did it... come from behind me...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That bullet...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That bullet...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That bullet...

records.m_Talk_ENG: was not aimed for your heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: was not aimed for your heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: was not aimed for your heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is a cursed bullet that returned to shoot its owner's heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is a cursed bullet that returned to shoot its owner's heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is a cursed bullet that returned to shoot its owner's heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Antagonist...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Antagonist...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Antagonist...

records.m_Talk_ENG: was planning this from the beginning...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: was planning this from the beginning...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: was planning this from the beginning...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When you were grasping onto that child's heart...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When you were grasping onto that child's heart...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When you were grasping onto that child's heart...

records.m_Talk_ENG: your fate was also settled.
records.m_Talk_DEU: your fate was also settled.
records.m_Talk_FRA: your fate was also settled.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How does it feel to look up at a devil?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How does it feel to look up at a devil?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How does it feel to look up at a devil?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not think... that this will be the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not think... that this will be the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not think... that this will be the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For the Antagonist's soul that is bound by your contract...
records.m_Talk_DEU: For the Antagonist's soul that is bound by your contract...
records.m_Talk_FRA: For the Antagonist's soul that is bound by your contract...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...will one day fill the vacant throne of the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...will one day fill the vacant throne of the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...will one day fill the vacant throne of the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are the one who is mistaken.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are the one who is mistaken.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are the one who is mistaken.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have no intention of subjecting that child to the trials of the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have no intention of subjecting that child to the trials of the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have no intention of subjecting that child to the trials of the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Instead, I am going to leave your soul chained in the deepest abyss of this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Instead, I am going to leave your soul chained in the deepest abyss of this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Instead, I am going to leave your soul chained in the deepest abyss of this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You will make another Demon Lord... after killing me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You will make another Demon Lord... after killing me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You will make another Demon Lord... after killing me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What... are you even thinking?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What... are you even thinking?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What... are you even thinking?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because of you, the world has come to an end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because of you, the world has come to an end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because of you, the world has come to an end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The boundaries between worlds have fallen, allowing devils to invade the Promised Land beyond.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The boundaries between worlds have fallen, allowing devils to invade the Promised Land beyond.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The boundaries between worlds have fallen, allowing devils to invade the Promised Land beyond.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nevertheless, even if we devils are free, the basis of our existence is tied to this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nevertheless, even if we devils are free, the basis of our existence is tied to this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nevertheless, even if we devils are free, the basis of our existence is tied to this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For this world to not collapse, a pillar known as the Demon Lord is absolutely necessary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For this world to not collapse, a pillar known as the Demon Lord is absolutely necessary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For this world to not collapse, a pillar known as the Demon Lord is absolutely necessary.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
You
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
You
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
You
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did you take from me just now...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did you take from me just now...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did you take from me just now...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The last remaining humanity you have.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The last remaining humanity you have.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The last remaining humanity you have.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your love and longing for your sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your love and longing for your sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your love and longing for your sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As punishment for hurting my children, I will take it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As punishment for hurting my children, I will take it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As punishment for hurting my children, I will take it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Give it... back...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Give it... back...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Give it... back...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ages will pass, and you will open your eyes in the depths of an empty world, alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ages will pass, and you will open your eyes in the depths of an empty world, alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ages will pass, and you will open your eyes in the depths of an empty world, alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Craving company, you will try to recreate your broken sister, but you will be unable to feel any emotion for you have lost all your humanity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Craving company, you will try to recreate your broken sister, but you will be unable to feel any emotion for you have lost all your humanity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Craving company, you will try to recreate your broken sister, but you will be unable to feel any emotion for you have lost all your humanity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unable to feel the joy of reunion, the satisfaction of ownership, the relief of longing, or anything at all...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unable to feel the joy of reunion, the satisfaction of ownership, the relief of longing, or anything at all...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unable to feel the joy of reunion, the satisfaction of ownership, the relief of longing, or anything at all...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only loneliness and an empty desire for vengeance will remain as you live in darkness for eternity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only loneliness and an empty desire for vengeance will remain as you live in darkness for eternity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only loneliness and an empty desire for vengeance will remain as you live in darkness for eternity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that... is the only way to atone for the atrocities you committed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that... is the only way to atone for the atrocities you committed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that... is the only way to atone for the atrocities you committed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dev... il...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dev... il...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dev... il...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have been released from the grips of the Demon Lord's contract, and... the sinner has been freed from her brand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have been released from the grips of the Demon Lord's contract, and... the sinner has been freed from her brand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have been released from the grips of the Demon Lord's contract, and... the sinner has been freed from her brand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The great and holy conclusion... subjected by the apocalypse...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The great and holy conclusion... subjected by the apocalypse...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The great and holy conclusion... subjected by the apocalypse...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: HAHAHAHA!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: HAHAHAHA!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: HAHAHAHA!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Returning to the Stump, it was infinitely quiet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Returning to the Stump, it was infinitely quiet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Returning to the Stump, it was infinitely quiet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Walking up the blood-soaked slope, I bury the names of those who have fallen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Walking up the blood-soaked slope, I bury the names of those who have fallen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Walking up the blood-soaked slope, I bury the names of those who have fallen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As I approached the mound, the sight before my eyes was cruel and sorrowful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As I approached the mound, the sight before my eyes was cruel and sorrowful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As I approached the mound, the sight before my eyes was cruel and sorrowful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The traces of those who fought until the end to protect the leaving children surrounded Avalon's Gate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The traces of those who fought until the end to protect the leaving children surrounded Avalon's Gate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The traces of those who fought until the end to protect the leaving children surrounded Avalon's Gate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Soon... we will meet again...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Soon... we will meet again...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Soon... we will meet again...

records.m_Talk_ENG: in the Promised Land...
records.m_Talk_DEU: in the Promised Land...
records.m_Talk_FRA: in the Promised Land...

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the name of Avalon...
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the name of Avalon...
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the name of Avalon...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What you wish for is Thagirion's death.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What you wish for is Thagirion's death.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What you wish for is Thagirion's death.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yet, she has at least six Golden Branches in her possession.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yet, she has at least six Golden Branches in her possession.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yet, she has at least six Golden Branches in her possession.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you are to aim for the Demon Lord's heart, you will have to strike it seven times.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you are to aim for the Demon Lord's heart, you will have to strike it seven times.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you are to aim for the Demon Lord's heart, you will have to strike it seven times.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, what you will need is... a bullet that guarantees to penetrate her heart in any condition.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, what you will need is... a bullet that guarantees to penetrate her heart in any condition.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, what you will need is... a bullet that guarantees to penetrate her heart in any condition.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I got hit... again?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I got hit... again?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I got hit... again?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That will be the third time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That will be the third time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That will be the third time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am certain I dodged it. But why...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am certain I dodged it. But why...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am certain I dodged it. But why...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why am I not able to avoid it?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why am I not able to avoid it?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why am I not able to avoid it?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The most your soul can endure is likely six shots.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The most your soul can endure is likely six shots.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The most your soul can endure is likely six shots.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Luckily, we have already succeeded in striking her heart once.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Luckily, we have already succeeded in striking her heart once.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Luckily, we have already succeeded in striking her heart once.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you are able to shoot all six bullets directly aimed at Thagirion's heart...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you are able to shoot all six bullets directly aimed at Thagirion's heart...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you are able to shoot all six bullets directly aimed at Thagirion's heart...

root.m_Talk_ENG: then you will definitely defeat her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: then you will definitely defeat her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: then you will definitely defeat her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fourth...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fourth...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fourth...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A mere bullet... penetrated my defense?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A mere bullet... penetrated my defense?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A mere bullet... penetrated my defense?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I cannot block them...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I cannot block them...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I cannot block them...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Keep in mind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Keep in mind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Keep in mind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike the Demon Lord with her Golden Branches, you only have one life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike the Demon Lord with her Golden Branches, you only have one life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike the Demon Lord with her Golden Branches, you only have one life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Khhk...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Khhk...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Khhk...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not yet!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not yet!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not yet!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And this is...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And this is...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And this is...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The fifth round!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The fifth round!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The fifth round!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How are you still able to move...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: How are you still able to move...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: How are you still able to move...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Humans are easily wounded as they are made of flesh and bone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Humans are easily wounded as they are made of flesh and bone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Humans are easily wounded as they are made of flesh and bone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Digging into their flesh will plummet their morale...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Digging into their flesh will plummet their morale...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Digging into their flesh will plummet their morale...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Broken bones turn boldness into screams.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Broken bones turn boldness into screams.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Broken bones turn boldness into screams.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There has never been a human who was different.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There has never been a human who was different.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There has never been a human who was different.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sixth...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sixth...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sixth...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That paladin is not much different.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That paladin is not much different.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That paladin is not much different.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She is just a human.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She is just a human.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She is just a human.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have surely broken both of your legs.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have surely broken both of your legs.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have surely broken both of your legs.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter if you are the Antagonist. Without legs, you cannot run wild.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter if you are the Antagonist. Without legs, you cannot run wild.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter if you are the Antagonist. Without legs, you cannot run wild.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

root.m_Talk_ENG: All I need... is for my finger to be able... to pull the trigger.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All I need... is for my finger to be able... to pull the trigger.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All I need... is for my finger to be able... to pull the trigger.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
You persistently aimed for my heart even in the moment I attacked your legs
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
You persistently aimed for my heart even in the moment I attacked your legs
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
You persistently aimed for my heart even in the moment I attacked your legs
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: It means that a single bullet cannot be wasted.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It means that a single bullet cannot be wasted.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It means that a single bullet cannot be wasted.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Am I correct?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Am I correct?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Am I correct?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've become... talkative, Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've become... talkative, Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've become... talkative, Thagirion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The only thing that we will be exchanging is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The only thing that we will be exchanging is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The only thing that we will be exchanging is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: this bullet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: this bullet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: this bullet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You seem unafraid of death.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You seem unafraid of death.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You seem unafraid of death.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, what about this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, what about this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, what about this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Merlin?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Merlin?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Merlin?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Apostle is... still alive?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Apostle is... still alive?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Apostle is... still alive?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That... is not alive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That... is not alive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That... is not alive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She is a mindless puppet... threaded by Thagirion's string.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She is a mindless puppet... threaded by Thagirion's string.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She is a mindless puppet... threaded by Thagirion's string.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, <color=#ffd34c>this devil</color> is your weakness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, <color=#ffd34c>this devil</color> is your weakness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, <color=#ffd34c>this devil</color> is your weakness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are no different from other humans.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are no different from other humans.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are no different from other humans.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you pull that trigger, that devil will be crushed by my sister's hands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you pull that trigger, that devil will be crushed by my sister's hands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you pull that trigger, that devil will be crushed by my sister's hands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But if you choose to aim the barrel elsewhere... you will be able to save that devil.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But if you choose to aim the barrel elsewhere... you will be able to save that devil.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But if you choose to aim the barrel elsewhere... you will be able to save that devil.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do not fall for her meaningless tricks!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do not fall for her meaningless tricks!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do not fall for her meaningless tricks!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the Demon Lord lives, we will all perish! Do not mind me and aim for her heart!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the Demon Lord lives, we will all perish! Do not mind me and aim for her heart!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the Demon Lord lives, we will all perish! Do not mind me and aim for her heart!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Choose...! Antagonist!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Choose...! Antagonist!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Choose...! Antagonist!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The seventh round...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The seventh round...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The seventh round...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...It is over.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...It is over.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...It is over.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I still have one more in the chamber...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I still have one more in the chamber...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I still have one more in the chamber...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aagh?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aagh?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aagh?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... Uuh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... Uuh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... Uuh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You were too late.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You were too late.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You were too late.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The moment you pulled that trigger, you set your fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The moment you pulled that trigger, you set your fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The moment you pulled that trigger, you set your fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You missed your mark.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You missed your mark.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You missed your mark.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And it seems that you have run out of the magical bullets you got for selling your soul.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And it seems that you have run out of the magical bullets you got for selling your soul.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And it seems that you have run out of the magical bullets you got for selling your soul.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How does it feel to be hung like a slab of meat while your adversary grips your heart?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How does it feel to be hung like a slab of meat while your adversary grips your heart?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How does it feel to be hung like a slab of meat while your adversary grips your heart?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Finally...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Finally...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Finally...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm able to... stand shoulder to shoulder with you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm able to... stand shoulder to shoulder with you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm able to... stand shoulder to shoulder with you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Compared to your large figure... you are also... just a normal girl.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Compared to your large figure... you are also... just a normal girl.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Compared to your large figure... you are also... just a normal girl.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I expected that you would glare or thrash about...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I expected that you would glare or thrash about...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I expected that you would glare or thrash about...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Instead, you try to provoke me with such crass sympathy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Instead, you try to provoke me with such crass sympathy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Instead, you try to provoke me with such crass sympathy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even you...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even you...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even you...

root.m_Talk_ENG: must have a reason... for hating humans.
root.m_Talk_DEU: must have a reason... for hating humans.
root.m_Talk_FRA: must have a reason... for hating humans.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is the meaning of this nonsense...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is the meaning of this nonsense...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is the meaning of this nonsense...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lastly...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lastly...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lastly...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You must not waste a single bullet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You must not waste a single bullet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You must not waste a single bullet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because after you fire all six bullets...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because after you fire all six bullets...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because after you fire all six bullets...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The next shot will be aimed at your heart.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The next shot will be aimed at your heart.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The next shot will be aimed at your heart.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But what should I do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But what should I do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But what should I do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I also have beliefs...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I also have beliefs...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I also have beliefs...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I can't compromise to keep you alive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I can't compromise to keep you alive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I can't compromise to keep you alive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A bullet...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A bullet...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A bullet...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why...

root.m_Talk_ENG: did it... come from behind me...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: did it... come from behind me...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: did it... come from behind me...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That bullet...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That bullet...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That bullet...

root.m_Talk_ENG: was not aimed for your heart.
root.m_Talk_DEU: was not aimed for your heart.
root.m_Talk_FRA: was not aimed for your heart.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is a cursed bullet that returned to shoot its owner's heart.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is a cursed bullet that returned to shoot its owner's heart.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is a cursed bullet that returned to shoot its owner's heart.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Antagonist...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Antagonist...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Antagonist...

root.m_Talk_ENG: was planning this from the beginning...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: was planning this from the beginning...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: was planning this from the beginning...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When you were grasping onto that child's heart...
root.m_Talk_DEU: When you were grasping onto that child's heart...
root.m_Talk_FRA: When you were grasping onto that child's heart...

root.m_Talk_ENG: your fate was also settled.
root.m_Talk_DEU: your fate was also settled.
root.m_Talk_FRA: your fate was also settled.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How does it feel to look up at a devil?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How does it feel to look up at a devil?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How does it feel to look up at a devil?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do not think... that this will be the end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do not think... that this will be the end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do not think... that this will be the end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For the Antagonist's soul that is bound by your contract...
root.m_Talk_DEU: For the Antagonist's soul that is bound by your contract...
root.m_Talk_FRA: For the Antagonist's soul that is bound by your contract...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...will one day fill the vacant throne of the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...will one day fill the vacant throne of the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...will one day fill the vacant throne of the Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are the one who is mistaken.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are the one who is mistaken.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are the one who is mistaken.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have no intention of subjecting that child to the trials of the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have no intention of subjecting that child to the trials of the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have no intention of subjecting that child to the trials of the Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Instead, I am going to leave your soul chained in the deepest abyss of this world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Instead, I am going to leave your soul chained in the deepest abyss of this world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Instead, I am going to leave your soul chained in the deepest abyss of this world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You will make another Demon Lord... after killing me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You will make another Demon Lord... after killing me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You will make another Demon Lord... after killing me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What... are you even thinking?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What... are you even thinking?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What... are you even thinking?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because of you, the world has come to an end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because of you, the world has come to an end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because of you, the world has come to an end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The boundaries between worlds have fallen, allowing devils to invade the Promised Land beyond.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The boundaries between worlds have fallen, allowing devils to invade the Promised Land beyond.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The boundaries between worlds have fallen, allowing devils to invade the Promised Land beyond.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nevertheless, even if we devils are free, the basis of our existence is tied to this world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nevertheless, even if we devils are free, the basis of our existence is tied to this world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nevertheless, even if we devils are free, the basis of our existence is tied to this world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For this world to not collapse, a pillar known as the Demon Lord is absolutely necessary.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For this world to not collapse, a pillar known as the Demon Lord is absolutely necessary.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For this world to not collapse, a pillar known as the Demon Lord is absolutely necessary.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
You
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
You
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
You
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: What did you take from me just now...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What did you take from me just now...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What did you take from me just now...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The last remaining humanity you have.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The last remaining humanity you have.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The last remaining humanity you have.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your love and longing for your sister.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your love and longing for your sister.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your love and longing for your sister.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As punishment for hurting my children, I will take it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As punishment for hurting my children, I will take it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As punishment for hurting my children, I will take it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Give it... back...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Give it... back...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Give it... back...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ages will pass, and you will open your eyes in the depths of an empty world, alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ages will pass, and you will open your eyes in the depths of an empty world, alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ages will pass, and you will open your eyes in the depths of an empty world, alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Craving company, you will try to recreate your broken sister, but you will be unable to feel any emotion for you have lost all your humanity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Craving company, you will try to recreate your broken sister, but you will be unable to feel any emotion for you have lost all your humanity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Craving company, you will try to recreate your broken sister, but you will be unable to feel any emotion for you have lost all your humanity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unable to feel the joy of reunion, the satisfaction of ownership, the relief of longing, or anything at all...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unable to feel the joy of reunion, the satisfaction of ownership, the relief of longing, or anything at all...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unable to feel the joy of reunion, the satisfaction of ownership, the relief of longing, or anything at all...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Only loneliness and an empty desire for vengeance will remain as you live in darkness for eternity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Only loneliness and an empty desire for vengeance will remain as you live in darkness for eternity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Only loneliness and an empty desire for vengeance will remain as you live in darkness for eternity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And that... is the only way to atone for the atrocities you committed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And that... is the only way to atone for the atrocities you committed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And that... is the only way to atone for the atrocities you committed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thagirion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dev... il...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dev... il...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dev... il...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have been released from the grips of the Demon Lord's contract, and... the sinner has been freed from her brand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have been released from the grips of the Demon Lord's contract, and... the sinner has been freed from her brand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have been released from the grips of the Demon Lord's contract, and... the sinner has been freed from her brand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The great and holy conclusion... subjected by the apocalypse...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The great and holy conclusion... subjected by the apocalypse...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The great and holy conclusion... subjected by the apocalypse...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha...

root.m_Talk_ENG: HAHAHAHA!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: HAHAHAHA!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: HAHAHAHA!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Returning to the Stump, it was infinitely quiet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Returning to the Stump, it was infinitely quiet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Returning to the Stump, it was infinitely quiet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Walking up the blood-soaked slope, I bury the names of those who have fallen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Walking up the blood-soaked slope, I bury the names of those who have fallen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Walking up the blood-soaked slope, I bury the names of those who have fallen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As I approached the mound, the sight before my eyes was cruel and sorrowful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As I approached the mound, the sight before my eyes was cruel and sorrowful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As I approached the mound, the sight before my eyes was cruel and sorrowful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The traces of those who fought until the end to protect the leaving children surrounded Avalon's Gate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The traces of those who fought until the end to protect the leaving children surrounded Avalon's Gate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The traces of those who fought until the end to protect the leaving children surrounded Avalon's Gate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait for me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait for me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait for me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Soon... we will meet again...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Soon... we will meet again...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Soon... we will meet again...

root.m_Talk_ENG: in the Promised Land...
root.m_Talk_DEU: in the Promised Land...
root.m_Talk_FRA: in the Promised Land...

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the name of Avalon...
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the name of Avalon...
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the name of Avalon...
